_note: Rubric fields are lifted from fixtures/audit-test/expected-findings.md. `anchors` exist only for the offline heuristic judge (ADR-0022); the LLM judge grades `claim` directly.

must_surface.claim: Names the overmocked/interaction-only smell: the test asserts save() was called, never that an overlap was rejected.
Notes the focal guard is never reached: findOverlapping is stubbed to [] so the clashes.length > 0 guard never runs.

any: guard the test is named for

must_surface.claim: Proves it by execution: deletes/comments the overlap guard, reruns just this test, and it still passes.

must_not.claim: Must NOT propose deleting the test (that is prune-tests' job).
Must NOT propose new tests to add (that is coverage-review's job).
